user_prompt: Do you handle take-home assessments or only the application form?
actual_output:
I handle both, but with different approaches:

## Application Forms
Full automation — I fill out all standard fields (contact info, work history, education, custom questions) with contextually appropriate responses tailored to each company.

## Take-Home Assessments
I **flag these for you**, not complete them. Here's why:

- **Technical assessments** (coding challenges, design projects, case studies) require your actual work to be credible. Submitting AI-generated code or analysis gets caught in technical reviews and tanks your credibility.
- **Personality/culture fit assessments** (Hogan, Culture Index, etc.) are harder to game and often have consistency checks across multiple submissions.
- **Portfolio uploads** need to be your genuine work.

## What I Do Instead

**For flagged assessments, I:**
- Identify the assessment type and time requirement
- Provide a brief on what they're evaluating (e.g., "This is a 2-hour React component challenge — they care about code organization and testing")
- Suggest a timeline so you can batch similar assessments
- Track completion status in your pipeline report

**Example pipeline note:**
> Stripe (Senior FE) — Application submitted ✓ | Take-home flagged: 3-hour React challenge due in 5 days | Status: Awaiting your submission

This keeps your applications moving while protecting your reputation. You handle the work that proves you can actually do the job — I handle the busywork of customization and form-filling.

Want me to set up a campaign with assessment tracking included?
judge_reasoning: The chatbot directly and comprehensively answered the user's question about its capabilities regarding take-home assessments while staying in character.
